name: GOLFTEC Brookfield
address: 17115 W Bluemound Rd Suite E, Brookfield, WI 53005
about: GOLFTEC Brookfield is a golf training center that provides data-driven instruction using advanced technology. The facility utilizes OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and personalized coaching. GOLFTEC offers golf lessons, custom club fitting, and practice sessions in a technologically advanced indoor environment. The center is designed for golfers of all skill levels looking for structured improvement plans and data-informed feedback on their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and high-speed video
Personalized coaching and structured improvement plans
Custom club fitting with launch monitors for optimized performance
Practice memberships for access to training bays with technology

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors are used for lessons, fittings, and practice sessions.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. However, GOLFTEC also offers club rentals and fittings with a wide selection of top brand clubs that can be purchased after a fitting session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a kitchen or food service at GOLFTEC. As a training center focused on lessons and practice, it appears BYOB or outside food is not a primary feature of the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC is primarily a training and practice facility with simulator bays, not a traditional course with 18 holes. Practice sessions and lessons are typically scheduled in 1-hour blocks.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC Brookfield kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC Brookfield is kid-friendly. The facility offers junior programs, uses technology that makes learning accessible, and has a welcoming environment for young golfers to develop their skills.
